title: Occupational Health and Safety Doctorate Program Mission and Vision
content:
Occupational Health and Safety Doctorate Program Mission and Vision

Mission

By offering an environment that respects universal rights and values and is based on contemporary knowledge; is to train specialists with a high sense of responsibility, who can think analytically, in the fields of occupational safety, worker safety and health, and to contribute to the country's knowledge and to meet the sectoral needs in line with its policies.

Vision

It trains occupational safety experts, managers and respected academics who contribute to the development of the occupational health and safety system in Turkey and ensure its adoption as a culture, conduct studies on national and international platforms within the framework of ethical rules, and interact with other disciplines and disciplines due to its multidisciplinary field. to be a pioneering program.
